notes: Omega (Kodi 21) 1.0.51 bundled in tag v1.1.9. Overlay = he_il + Hebrew fontset + Rubik/Noto fonts + power-menu items + GearsAI OSD button + Gears home/search/power shortcuts + hero Label fix. | upstream_tag tracks the RELEASE TAG (v1.1.9) which differs from base_version (1.0.51, the bundled Omega addon); the watcher compares tags.
